rationale: Correct domain framing with multiple valid techniques (dual-memory, parameter isolation, rehearsal, external safeguards) but lacks calibrated confidence markers, explicit trade-off matrix, and second-order effect analysis required for score 4+.
rubric_evidence: dual-memory design: keep safety constraints in a stable, separately versioned policy layer
Run every model update through a regression suite with red-team evaluations
enforce external safeguards like policy checkers, tool permissions, and refusal classifiers so safety does not depend solely on remembered weights
